p.seg: Richard by the grace of God humble servant of the church of St Andrews to all sons of Holy Mother Church, Greeting:

Let those to come as well as those present know that we have given and granted and by this our charter made firm to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh, and to the canons serving God there, the church of Bolton, to be held in free and perpetual alms. Wherefore I will and by episcopal authority command that the said canons should hold that church freely, quietly and honourably with everything rightfully belonging to it. Reserving episcopal right, and reserving the tenure of Ralph de St-Martin.

With these witnesses, Master Andrew archdeacon of Lothian, Walter archdeacon of St Andrews, John the Bishop Robert’s nephew, Aiulf dean of Lothian, Alexander and William chaplains of Bishop Richard, Geoffrey the bishop’s steward, Master Abraham, Robert the chaplain, Godwin the chaplain, David the chaplain, Hugh the bishop’s butler, and very many other men of good testimony.
